title: Celebrity stagnation
detail: 419K stars + 45K forks but 2 commits + 0 issue activity in last 90 days (OpenSSF Maintained 1/10). Social signal is top-20 GitHub, throughput is near zero.

title: Approval gate bottleneck
detail: 14/15 recent PR-triggered workflow runs have conclusion 'action_required'. Workflows require maintainer approval to run on fork PRs, and approvals aren't happening at scale. Code-Review score 1/10 (4/29 changesets reviewed).

title: Link validation via scheduled workflow
detail: Dedicated 'Validate links' workflow runs on schedule using Python requests to check URL liveness for the 195KB README. Pattern is transferable for any link-rot-sensitive artifact.

title: Commercial capture pattern
detail: README opens with APILayer sponsorship block + product table BEFORE the community-curated index. Community labor was channeled into commercial lead-gen surface. Cautionary pattern for any community distribution model.

title: OpenSSF Scorecard 2.3/10
detail: Zero scores across Branch-Protection, SAST, Security-Policy, Fuzzing, CII-Best-Practices. Only License (10) and Binary-Artifacts (10) are high. Low blast radius because it's a curated list not runtime code, but hygiene is poor for a top-20 repo.

title: Bus factor 2
detail: 10 contributors but top 2 (matheusfelipeog 826 + davemachado 683) = 1509 commits vs next 8 all ≤150 each. Effectively maintained by 2 people, neither of whom is merging much anymore.

title: Massive absolute engagement
detail: 419K stars + 45K forks + 4,572 watchers + 1,191 open issues. Even with stagnation, this repo has inertia few projects ever achieve. Valuable as a reference for 'what peak awesome-list looks like'.
